title: Chio HTTP Error Envelope
description: JSON-RPC 2.0 error envelope returned by the chio-http edge. Mirrors the inline shape constructed by `json_rpc_error` in `crates/chio-mcp-adapter/src/transport.rs` lines 1307-1316, the structured `EdgeTaskFinalOutcome::JsonRpcError` and `ToolCallEdgeOutcome::JsonRpcError` variants in `crates/chio-mcp-edge/src/runtime.rs` lines 405-425, and the `JsonRpcProtocolErrorArgs` carrier in the same file lines 427-436. The optional `data` field carries Chio-specific error context including a numeric `chio_code`, a stable `name`, a `retry_strategy` token, human-facing `guidance`, and an opaque `context` payload as documented by `JsonRpcProtocolErrorArgs`.

jsonrpc.description: Protocol version literal. Always the string '2.0'.

id.description: Identifier of the originating JSON-RPC request, echoed verbatim. May be null when the request id could not be parsed.

error.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 error object. Mirrors the inline `error` map in `transport.rs::json_rpc_error`.

code.description: JSON-RPC error code. Standard codes (-32700, -32600, -32601, -32602, -32603) and Chio-specific extensions (for example -32002 server-not-initialized, -32042 url-elicitation-required, 1000 protocol-version-unsupported, 1002 invalid-request-shape) are all permitted. Mirrors the `code` argument of `json_rpc_error` and the constants near `crates/chio-mcp-edge/src/runtime.rs` lines 40-47.

message.description: Human-readable error message. Mirrors the `message` argument of `json_rpc_error`.

data.description: Optional structured error data. When populated by Chio it follows the `JsonRpcProtocolErrorArgs` carrier shape (`crates/chio-mcp-edge/src/runtime.rs` lines 427-436); when populated by adapter-error fan-in it is forwarded verbatim by `adapter_jsonrpc_error` (transport.rs lines 1318-1331).
